note: seq=14: CORRECT ~200-lane threaded enrichment pool (gather/apply split, ~12 procs x 16 threads = ~192 lanes on ~12 PG conns) alongside the 24 sync workers. --selftest fail-loud gate => auto-rollback on any breakage (sync fleet keeps running, no throughput loss). Reuses the deployed worker's tested enrichment + .gov/.mil suppression verbatim. Never leaves PG down (puller pg-accepting health gate).

steps.note: seq=14: threaded enrichment POOL (gather/apply split). Deploy atlas_enrich_pool.py to /opt/atlas/enrich (imports the tested atlas_enrich_worker helpers); --selftest gate; install atlas-enrich-pool@.service; enable+start @1..@12 = 12 procs x 16 threads = ~192 in-flight lanes on 12 PG conns. RUNS ALONGSIDE the 24 sync workers (throughput never drops); SKIP LOCKED prevents double-claim. Pure-network gather holds NO PG connection during DNS/HTTP/MX. Once proven by bench, sync fleet can retire to reach the clean ~12-conn/~190-lane steady state.

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_pool.py':'f2aec50d1d0a655e60da0b441bc38ccee0c640b44f17f0a457b4853e21827997'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS threaded enrichment pool worker (instance %i; ~16 in-flight lanes/process, gather/apply on 1 PG conn)
Documentation=https://github.com/cloudwalker171/atlas-manifests
After=network-online.target postgresql.service
Wants=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=ATLAS_WORKER_INSTANCE=%i
Environment=ATLAS_POOL_CONCURRENCY=16
Environment=ATLAS_DB_ENV=/etc/atlas/db.env
Environment=ATLAS_AUTOPULL_CONF=/etc/atlas/autopull.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/enrich/atlas_enrich_pool.py --loop
Restart=always
RestartSec=5
Nice=10
IOSchedulingClass=idle
TimeoutStopSec=20

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target
